params.name: Edison's Kinetoscope
params.description:
On May 26, 1895 AD, the movie projector played the first film, Workers Leaving The Lumiere Factory.
On this day, Broadway audiences saw characters on a screen for the first time. Outside the gates of a factory, off-duty workers went out the door, and passersby walked and rode bicycles in a realistic, natural scene. It used the device invented by Dixon to print each frame on a separate cell and then install them onto a wheel in series. When the handle turns the wheel, the image will move, so i …
